description: Composite unique identifier combining zip_code year and quarter. Format: [zip]_[year]_Q[quarter].
5-digit Maryland zip code. Only zip codes appearing in the foreclosure dataset are included serving as the ground truth for valid Maryland zip codes.
Calendar year of the observation. Filtered to 2023-2025 where all source datasets have coverage.
Total foreclosure notices filed in this zip-quarter. Filled with 0 where no source record existed within the 2023-2025 window since no record means zero activity.
Total EV and plug-in hybrid registrations in this zip-quarter. Filled with 0 where no source record existed. Combines Electric and Plug-in Hybrid categories.
Total reported sewer overflow incidents in this zip-quarter. Filled with 0 where no source record existed.

Number of unique solid waste violation dates in this zip-quarter. Counts unique dates rather than individual violations to control for multi-violation inspections. Filled with 0 where no source record existed.
